subcodes.first_line: O Divine friends! This yearning one's desire to behold the countenances of the friends is such that for each one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهى این مشتاق روى دوستانرا آرزو چنانست که بهر یک از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
